title: TarkovZ Essentials
body:
This mod brings the gritty survival atmosphere of Tarkov and DayZ into Minecraft. It adds a wide range of valuable loot items, rare collectibles, and trade goods that can be scavenged, stored, or sold. You’ll also find new decorative blocks designed to give your bases and safehouses that authentic post-apocalyptic feel.

Whether you’re building a survival server or just want to add more immersion to your world, this mod expands gameplay with:

Valuable loot items inspired by Tarkov & DayZ (electronics, cash, barter goods, rare stashes).

Survival-themed decorations to make shelters, bunkers, and outposts more immersive.

Perfect compatibility with hardcore survival packs and multiplayer roleplay servers.

Scavenge, stash, and survive — every item tells a story.
